generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance GantryStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlled via TMC4671-Eval driver for precise positioning of the gantry crane's horizontal and vertical axes. Provides threshold-based notifications for positioning errors."
]

instance CraneElectromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet used for attachment/detachment of pucks with threshold-based notifications for load capacity breaches. Operates within predefined safety constraints."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-precision angular position sensor attached to the puck or hoist mechanism measuring swing orientation for alignment validation during transport."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneAnemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor measuring wind speed/direction near the crane for safety and operational context monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AnemometerDataTransmitted
]

instance AirQualitySensorSuite : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi-hosted sensor suite measuring indoor air quality metrics for virus spread prevention analysis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirQualityDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance AnemometerDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneAnemometer
]

instance AirQualityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AirQualitySensorSuite
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance CraneKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Mathematical model derived from Autodesk Fusion 360 CAD representations simulating crane joint trajectories, payload dynamics, and kinematic constraints."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBStorage
]

instance EnvironmentalDataLog : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series dataset capturing operational telemetry including joint angles, motor currents, sensor readings, and executed trajectory data for post-analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted, AnemometerDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBStorage
]

instance AirQualityMetrics : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured air quality measurements including particulate matter, CO₂ levels, temperature, and humidity for predictive modeling and visualization."
    DTDFVocab:fromData AirQualityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzureIoTHub
]

instance SimulationTrajectoryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Predicted trajectory data generated by the digital twin's kinematic model for comparison against executed physical trajectories during validation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ContinuousValidationService
]

instance PrerecordedDataSet : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Preloaded time-series dataset within virtual machine environment enabling offline simulation and validation of greenhouse conditions."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GreenhouseDTSimulation
]

// C11: Enablers
instance TimescaleDBStorage : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database optimized for high-frequency data ingestion and querying of operational telemetry from the gantry crane system."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataManagementService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Message broker facilitating low-latency bidirectional communication between physical crane components and digital twin services via MQTT protocol."
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, DataManagementService
]

instance GrafanaDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization platform displaying real-time crane telemetry, validation metrics, and historical trends queried from TimescaleDB."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance DockerContainer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Standardized containerized deployment environment ensuring reproducible execution of digital twin services across development and educational setups."
    DTDFVocab:enables DeploymentService
]

instance AutomationMLModel : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Standardized modeling language defining structural and behavioral representations of air quality management systems for model-driven engineering."
    DTDFVocab:enables AirQualitySimulation
]

instance AzureIoTHub : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Cloud-based IoT platform enabling real-time visualization, simulation, and predictive analytics for air quality management systems."
    DTDFVocab:enables AirQualityVisualization
]

instance PythonControlService : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based implementation of real-time control logic, data processing, and service orchestration for crane trajectory generation and adjustment."
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

// C6: Services
instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computes optimized motion paths for the gantry crane based on kinematic constraints using the CraneKinematicModel, feeding control commands back to the physical system."
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryOptimizationInsight, ControlCommandAction
]

instance DataManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs operational telemetry to TimescaleDB and ensures temporal alignment between physical and digital states through continuous data streaming."
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight, DataSynchronizationAction
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares physical vs. digital states in real-time using distance metrics to detect discrepancies like sensor drift or actuator failures."
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationMetricsInsight, FaultDetectionAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time monitoring interface via Grafana displaying crane kinematics, control parameters, and historical trends."
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneDashboardInsight, SpatialContextAction
]

instance AirQualityVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Runtime visualization of indoor air quality metrics through Azure-hosted dashboards for monitoring particulate matter and CO₂ levels."
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualityDashboardInsight
]

instance AirQualitySimulation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Scenario-based modeling of air quality dynamics to assess virus spread risks using AutomationML-based models."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationScenarioInsight
]

instance DeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Manages containerized deployment of digital twin services ensuring reproducibility across environments using Docker."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeploymentInsight
]

instance GreenhouseDTSimulation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offline simulation environment using prerecorded data to validate greenhouse conditions and adaptive behaviors."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationValidationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance TrajectoryOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized motion paths computed for the gantry crane based on kinematic constraints and real-time adjustments."
]

instance ControlCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Bidirectional control commands transmitted to the physical crane system for real-time trajectory adjustment."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Post-analysis dataset of operational telemetry including joint angles, motor currents, and sensor readings stored in TimescaleDB."
]

instance DataSynchronizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Continuous data streaming ensuring temporal alignment between physical and digital states."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ValidationMetricsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time comparison metrics between physical and digital states detecting discrepancies like sensor drift."
]

instance FaultDetectionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated anomaly detection identifying actuator failures or sensor malfunctions through cross-referencing logged data."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CraneDashboardInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane kinematics, control parameters, and historical trends via Grafana dashboard."
]

instance SpatialContextAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "3D CAD model rendering within the digital twin providing spatial context for crane operations."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AirQualityDashboardInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization of real-time air quality metrics including particulate matter and CO₂ levels."
]

instance SimulationScenarioInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Scenario-based modeling outputs assessing potential virus spread risks under different environmental conditions."
]

instance PredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasted air quality trends providing predictive analytics for proactive decision-making."
]

instance DeploymentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Containerized deployment status and reproducibility metrics for digital twin services."
]

instance SimulationValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation results comparing simulated greenhouse conditions against prerecorded data sets."
]

// C1: Environment
instance LabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains GantryCraneSystem, AirQualityManagementSystem
]

// C5: Components
instance GantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lab-scale cyber-physical system comprising mechanical gantry structure, stepper motors, electromagnet, and sensor suite for research and educational purposes."
    base:isContainedIn LabEnvironment
]

instance AirQualityManagementSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi-hosted sensor suite integrated with Azure tools for indoor air quality monitoring and predictive analytics."
    base:isContainedIn LabEnvironment
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python program bridging the physical crane and digital twin, transmitting real-time operational data via MQTT."
    base:isContainedIn LabEnvironment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "
The **Control Application** (Python-based) generates control commands for the **Physical Crane** via the **Physical Crane Interface**, utilizing trajectories generated by the **Trajectory Generator Service**. Command types are derived from kinematic models to ensure optimal movement (e.g., trajectory paths with zero residual swinging). No explicit command formats (e.g., JSON, binary) or validation/authentication mechanisms are documented, though the **Continuous Validation Service** indirectly ensures trajectory accuracy by comparing executed vs. simulated paths. Feedback systems are not described beyond the **Logging Application** capturing execution outcomes. Conflict resolution is not addressed, and no confirmation mechanisms (e.g., acknowledgments) are mentioned. The **Human Machine Interface** allows operator adjustments, but specifics (e.g., command hierarchy, emergency stops) are absent.
"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The provided documents do not explicitly detail synchronization frequencies, latency requirements, or specific temporal granularities for the Digital Twin systems. However, qualitative temporal aspects are inferred:
  - **GreenhouseDT** implies continuous or near-real-time behavioral adaptation of both the physical greenhouse and its digital twin, facilitated by prerecorded data in virtual machines and real-time data ingestion via InfluxDB.
  - **Air Quality Management** includes runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction applications, suggesting real-time or near-real-time data processing for indoor air quality monitoring, though no explicit latency metrics are provided.
  - **Lab Scale Gantry Crane** features a 'Continuous Validation Service' and a 'Logging Application' that continuously logs the crane's state, indicating real-time or near-real-time synchronization between the physical crane and its digital twin. The system also includes a 'real-time status' display, reinforcing the need for low-latency interactions.

  No quantitative temporal specifications (e.g., Hz, ms, or synchronization intervals) are mentioned in the documents."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin systems described employ **ad-hoc orchestration patterns** without reliance on commercial Digital Twin frameworks. The **GreenhouseDT** uses a **modular architecture** with **InfluxDB** for time-series data storage, **ActiveMQ** for message brokering (likely enabling asynchronous communication between components), and **virtual machines** for deployment, suggesting a **containerized or virtualized microservices approach**. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar integrates **Microsoft Azure tools** (e.g., cloud services for simulation, prediction, and visualization) with **AutomationML-based digital twin models**, indicating a **hybrid on-premise/cloud orchestration**. Both exemplars lack explicit **system-wide coordination mechanisms** (e.g., API gateways, service meshes) or **resource management policies** (e.g., load balancing, failover strategies). The **GreenhouseDT**’s behavioral adaptation implies **dynamic reconfiguration** of both physical and digital components, but no **formalized constellation patterns** (e.g., peer-to-peer, master-slave) are documented. The **Lab Scale Gantry Crane** system (referenced in the discussion) follows similar ad-hoc design choices, with no mention of **orchestration frameworks** or **component integration standards** beyond containerization/virtualization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The provided documents do not explicitly detail lifecycle stages for any exemplar Digital Twin system. However, the **GreenhouseDT** exemplar implies a lifecycle involving **development (self-adaptive digital twin and physical system adaptation)**, **runtime operation (behavioral adaptation of both physical and digital components)**, and **maintenance (prerecorded data in virtual machine images for easy installation)**. Transition management is inferred to rely on **InfluxDB for time-series data storage** and **ActiveMQ for message brokering**, ensuring synchronization between physical and digital states. Governance is not explicitly described, but the use of **GitHub-hosted documentation** suggests versioned lifecycle artifacts. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar includes **runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction** as lifecycle phases, with **AutomationML-based digital twin models** serving as a foundational representation. The **Lab Scale Gantry Crane** lacks lifecycle documentation, but its **C4 Model architecture** suggests modular lifecycle phases (e.g., design, deployment, operation) with **containerization** facilitating iterative updates. **Not in Document** for explicit governance frameworks or formal transition protocols."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "
The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar emphasizes **behavioral adaptation** of both physical and digital systems, requiring **continuous validation** via **real-time data reconciliation** between the twin and the greenhouse. Fidelity is ensured through **prerecorded data** in virtual machines, allowing offline validation against ground truth. Uncertainty sources include **sensor noise**, **environmental variability**, and **model approximation errors**, though quantification methods are not detailed. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar employs **AutomationML-based models** for high-fidelity digital representations, with validation via **runtime visualization** and **prediction accuracy metrics** (e.g., RMSE for air quality forecasts). Microsoft Azure tools provide **cloud-based validation** against historical and real-time sensor data. For the **Lab Scale Gantry Crane**, fidelity considerations likely include **geometric accuracy** of CAD models, **kinematic precision** of motion simulations, and **control algorithm robustness**. Error detection mechanisms may involve **residual analysis** (e.g., comparing predicted vs. actual puck positions) and **adaptive filtering** for sensor data. Quality assurance processes are not explicitly described but are implied to include **periodic recalibration** of sensors and **model retraining** based on operational data.
"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "
The digital twin’s technical connection relies on an **MQTT Broker** for inter-service signaling (e.g., between the **Trajectory Generator Service**, **Simulation Service**, and **Continuous Validation Service**), but no network topology (e.g., segments, gateways) or protocols (e.g., TCP/IP, UDP) are specified. All software containers (including the broker) are hosted on a **single personal computer**, eliminating separate network segments. Bandwidth, latency, or redundancy mechanisms are not documented. Security protocols are not mentioned, though the **MQTT Broker** implies a need for secure signaling. The **Physical Crane Interface** communicates directly with the crane’s controllers via unspecified hardware protocols, with no details on encryption or authentication.
"
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "
The **deployment infrastructure** for the Digital Twin system is described as a **containerized architecture** using the **C4 Model**, with components deployed as **logical containers** (not Docker containers). The system is designed for **on-premise deployment**, with the following specifications:
- **Hosting platforms**:
  - **On-premise**: All components (e.g., **Database**, **Dashboard**, **Services**) are deployed locally, co-located with the **Physical Crane** for **low-latency operation**.
  - **No cloud or edge deployment** is mentioned, but the architecture supports **scalability** for future expansion.
- **Computational and storage requirements**:
  - **Database (TimescaleDB)**: Requires sufficient storage for **historical and real-time data** (capacity not specified but likely **GBs to TBs** depending on operational duration).
  - **Services (Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Validation)**: Require **moderate computational resources** (e.g., **multi-core CPUs**, **GPU acceleration** for physics simulations if applicable).
  - **Dashboard (Grafana)**: Needs **minimal resources** but requires **real-time data ingestion** for visualization.
- **Scalability mechanisms**:
  - **Horizontal scaling** is implied for services (e.g., **Trajectory Generator** or **Simulation Service**) to handle increased workloads.
  - **Database sharding** or partitioning could be implemented for **large-scale data** (not mentioned but feasible with TimescaleDB).
- **Deployment models supported**:
  - **Monolithic deployment**: All services and containers are deployed as a **single cohesive unit** for simplicity.
  - **Microservices deployment**: Services are **decoupled** via MQTT, allowing independent scaling or updates.
- **Availability/reliability assurance**:
  - **High availability** is not explicitly guaranteed, but the system’s **closed-loop validation** ensures **operational integrity**.
  - **Fault tolerance** is implied through:
    - **Continuous logging** (via **Logging Application**) for post-mortem analysis.
    - **Operator alerts** via the **Dashboard** for proactive intervention.
  - **Redundancy**: Not described, but the **Physical Crane** can operate **without the Digital Twin**, ensuring **graceful degradation**.
"
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin systems exhibit the following integration patterns with external systems:
  - **GreenhouseDT**: Integrates with external systems via InfluxDB (for time-series data storage) and ActiveMQ (for message brokering). The system relies on virtual machines for deployment, which may interact with external services through standard protocols (e.g., HTTP, MQTT) but lacks explicit mention of interoperability standards like OPC UA or standardized data exchange protocols. The ad-hoc nature of the design suggests custom integration points.
  - **Air Quality Management**: Uses a Raspberry Pi with sensors for the physical system and integrates with Microsoft Azure tools for the digital twin pipeline. The system does not explicitly detail external system dependencies or interoperability standards, though AutomationML may facilitate some level of interoperability within the construction engineering domain. No mention of OPC UA or other standardized protocols is provided.
  - **Lab Scale Gantry Crane**: Employs an ad-hoc approach with containerization, integrating with external systems through unspecified means. The system lacks explicit details on data exchange protocols or interoperability standards, though the use of containerization may enable modular integration with other services. No mention of OPC UA or enterprise system dependencies is provided.

  None of the systems explicitly adopt standardized interoperability protocols (e.g., OPC UA, ODA) or formalized integration patterns with other Digital Twins or enterprise systems."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "
GreenhouseDT:
The system adheres to **open-source and commonly used technologies** (InfluxDB, ActiveMQ, virtual machines) but does not explicitly comply with any industry standards. Interoperability is achieved through **message brokering (ActiveMQ)** and **time-series databases (InfluxDB)**, though no formal standardization frameworks (e.g., ISO/IEC) are mentioned.

Air Quality Management:
The digital twin uses **AutomationML** as its primary standard for digital twin representation, though the document does not specify compliance with **ISO 15926-11** or other formal frameworks. Interoperability is facilitated by **Microsoft Azure tools**, which support cloud-based integration. No explicit certification requirements or compliance frameworks (e.g., ISO 27001) are detailed.

Lab Scale Gantry Crane:
The system relies on **open-source tools** and **C4 Model architecture** for documentation but does not mention adherence to any industry standards. Interoperability is implied through the **GitHub repository structure** and **test-driven development**, though no formal standardization or certification is referenced.
"
]
